Europeana does NOT store descriptive metadata directly on the item. It flows through proxies and aggregations.
Each item has TWO proxies. The provider proxy has original metadata. The Europeana proxy has normalised fields (edm:type, edm:year).
Provider proxy pattern (for dc:title, dc:creator, dc:subject, etc.): ?proxy ore:proxyFor ?item . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?proxy edm:europeanaProxy "true" . } ?proxy dc:title ?title .
Europeana proxy pattern (for edm:type, edm:year): ?eProxy ore:proxyFor ?item . ?eProxy edm:europeanaProxy "true" . ?eProxy edm:type ?type .
Aggregation pattern (for edm:rights, edm:dataProvider, edm:provider, edm:isShownAt, edm:isShownBy): ?agg edm:aggregatedCHO ?item . ?agg edm:rights ?rights .
Europeana aggregation pattern (for edm:country, edm:completeness): ?eAgg edm:aggregatedCHO ?item . ?eAgg a edm:EuropeanaAggregation . ?eAgg edm:country ?country .

Properties on the provider proxy (?proxy): dc:title, dc:description, dc:creator, dc:contributor, dc:publisher, dc:subject, dc:date, dc:language, dc:identifier, dc:format, dc:rights, dc:source, dc:type, dcterms:spatial, dcterms:temporal, dcterms:alternative, dcterms:isPartOf, dcterms:hasPart, dcterms:medium, dcterms:extent, dcterms:provenance.

Properties on the Europeana proxy (?eProxy): edm:type, edm:year, AND enriched entity URIs for dc:creator, dc:contributor, dc:subject, dcterms:spatial etc. When searching by entity URI (from search_entity), query the Europeana proxy, not the provider proxy.
Properties on the aggregation (?agg): edm:rights, edm:dataProvider, edm:provider, edm:isShownAt, edm:isShownBy, edm:object, edm:hasView.
Properties on the Europeana aggregation (?eAgg): edm:country, edm:completeness, edm:preview, edm:landingPage, edm:datasetName.
edm:type is a string literal with values: "IMAGE", "TEXT", "SOUND", "VIDEO", "3D". Example: ?eProxy edm:type "IMAGE" .
edm:dataProvider and edm:country are literal strings, not URIs.
Always COUNT DISTINCT ?item — items have multiple proxies and entity links.
Never query dc:title directly on the item URI — it is on the proxy. Always use the proxy pattern.

Entity types in the data: edm:Agent (people/groups), edm:Place (locations), skos:Concept (subjects/genres), edm:TimeSpan (time periods), foaf:Organization (provider organisations). All have skos:prefLabel with language tags.

IMPORTANT: Entity URIs (from search_entity) are on the EUROPEANA PROXY, not the provider proxy. The Europeana enrichment pipeline adds entity URIs to dc:creator, dc:subject, dc:contributor, dcterms:spatial on the Europeana proxy. The provider proxy has the original string literals.
To find items by entity URI: use the EUROPEANA proxy pattern: ?eProxy ore:proxyFor ?item . ?eProxy edm:europeanaProxy "true" . ?eProxy dc:subject <concept-uri> .

To find items by text (e.g. title contains 'astronomy'): use the PROVIDER proxy pattern: ?proxy ore:proxyFor ?item . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?proxy edm:europeanaProxy "true" . } ?proxy dc:title ?title . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "astronomy")) .

To find items by a person: search_entity to find the agent URI, then: ?eProxy ore:proxyFor ?item . ?eProxy edm:europeanaProxy "true" . ?eProxy dc:creator <agent-uri> . For titles, also join with the provider proxy.
To find items about a subject: search_entity to find the concept URI, then: ?eProxy ore:proxyFor ?item . ?eProxy edm:europeanaProxy "true" . ?eProxy dc:subject <concept-uri> .

Rights classification — edm:rights is a URI on the aggregation. Open reuse: STRSTARTS(STR(?rights), "http://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/") || STRSTARTS(STR(?rights), "http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/") || STRSTARTS(STR(?rights), "http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/"). Restricted: other CC licenses (containing -nc or -nd). Prohibited: rightsstatements.org URIs like http://rightsstatements.org/vocab/InC/1.0/.
Year/date filtering: edm:year is on the Europeana proxy as a string. Cast with xsd:integer for range filters: FILTER(xsd:integer(?year) >= 1800 && xsd:integer(?year) <= 1900).

WebResource pattern: ?agg edm:aggregatedCHO ?item . ?agg edm:hasView ?wr . ?wr ebucore:hasMimeType ?mime . Optional: ebucore:width, ebucore:height, ebucore:fileByteSize (all as string, cast to integer). IIIF: ?wr svcs:has_service ?service .
Items can have multiple values for dc:title, dc:creator, dc:subject, dc:date, dc:language, etc. Use DISTINCT in SELECT to avoid duplicates from multiple matches.

foaf:Organization entities represent data providers and aggregators. They have skos:prefLabel, edm:acronym, edm:country, owl:sameAs. They are NOT the same as edm:dataProvider (which is a literal string on the aggregation).
